strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior and staff-level roles, including optimizing cloud-based platforms handling millions of transactions.
Direct, hands-on experience with AI agent development and infrastructure, specifically building MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Exceptional software craftsmanship and testing background, demonstrated by teaching TDD, creating custom test runners (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and managing Docker/Kubernetes deployments.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest/Playwright, though he possesses deep Node.js, TypeScript, and general testing framework expertise.
Recent start date at his current Staff Software Engineer role (April 2025) may prompt questions regarding his availability or reasons for a transition.
Secondary technologies like Kotlin and specific relational databases (PostgreSQL) are not explicitly detailed, with experience leaning more heavily toward Java and MongoDB.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, combining well over the required 6 years of experience with deep mastery of the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His recent work building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators directly fulfills the niche AI development requirement, providing immediate upside for modern tooling initiatives. Furthermore, his profound commitment to software craftsmanship—evidenced by his extensive background in TDD, open-source testing libraries, and cloud containerization—ensures he will rapidly contribute to building scalable, highly reliable enterprise solutions while elevating the team's engineering standards.
